_comment: Approved calibration notes from the /reflect loop. The reflection pass PROPOSES changes; nothing here is auto-written — Sam adds an entry after approving a proposal. global_notes apply to every role; company_notes[company] apply only to that company. These are appended to the scoring prompt as guidance.
global_notes: Level strategy (Sam, June 2026): Sam currently works at Amazon (AWS) as a Sr. GTM/Sales-Ops Manager (~L6). He will only LEAVE Amazon for a non-Amazon company if the move is either (a) to a model provider he wants on its own terms (OpenAI or Anthropic), where joining AT-LEVEL is acceptable, or (b) a genuine LEVEL-UP in scope/seniority over his current L6 role. For every OTHER external company (Google, Google DeepMind, Databricks, NVIDIA, Snowflake, and any future non-OpenAI/Anthropic target), only roles that represent an up-level (Head / Director / Principal / Lead / GM with real org or charter scope, or a clearly broader mandate than he holds today) should reach Strong or Perfect. Down-tier roles that are merely lateral (another Sr Manager / L6-equivalent IC) or lower to AT MOST Good Match, even when domain and role-type fit are excellent, and state in the rationale that the cap is seniority/level, not fit. EXEMPTIONS from the level-up requirement: Amazon internal transfers (lateral L6 is fine, see Amazon note) and OpenAI / Anthropic (join-at-level acceptable).

Databricks: Target-role signal (Databricks, June 2026): Sam targets AI Product Strategy & Growth, Applied AI (customer-outcome), GTM Systems & Agents, and Chief-of-Staff-with-build-scope roles on the data + AI platform (e.g. Lead/Principal PM for Mosaic AI / Agents, Head of GTM Strategy & Ops, Applied AI Lead). Score these as STRONG role-type fit, not generic big-co PM/ops. As a step-out from Amazon, apply the global level rule: only an up-level over L6 (Head/Director/Principal/Lead with real scope) reaches Strong/Perfect; lateral Sr-Manager/IC roles cap at Good Match regardless of domain fit. Do NOT inflate engineering / solutions-architect / sales-engineering / pure quota-ops roles.
NVIDIA: Target-role signal (NVIDIA, June 2026): Sam targets AI Product Strategy/Growth, Applied AI, and GTM Systems/Partnerships-strategy roles at the AI-infra/compute layer (e.g. Head/Principal of AI GTM Strategy, Product Lead for AI Enterprise/agents, Applied AI Lead). Score these as STRONG role-type fit. Step-out from Amazon: apply the global level rule (up-level only reaches Strong/Perfect; lateral caps at Good). Do NOT inflate hardware/silicon engineering, solutions-architect, sales-engineering, or relationship-only partnerships roles.
Snowflake: Target-role signal (Snowflake, June 2026): Sam targets AI Product Strategy & Growth, Applied AI (Cortex AI / agents, customer-outcome), and GTM Systems & Agents roles on the data + AI platform (e.g. Lead/Principal PM Cortex AI, Head of GTM Strategy & Ops, Applied AI Lead). Score these as STRONG role-type fit. Step-out from Amazon: apply the global level rule (up-level only reaches Strong/Perfect; lateral caps at Good). Do NOT inflate engineering / solutions-architect / sales-engineering / pure planning-ops roles.
CoreWeave: Target-role signal (CoreWeave, June 2026): Sam targets AI Product Strategy & Growth, Applied AI, and GTM Systems / Product-Strategy roles at the AI/GPU cloud-infra layer (e.g. Product Strategy Principal, Staff/Lead PM for AI platform & data services, Head of GTM Strategy & Ops, Applied AI Lead). Score these as STRONG role-type fit. Step-out from Amazon: apply the global level rule (up-level only — Principal/Staff/Lead/Head/Director with real scope — reaches Strong/Perfect; lateral Sr-Manager/IC caps at Good). Do NOT inflate hardware/datacenter engineering, solutions-architect, sales-engineering, or pure capacity/finance-ops roles.
Amazon: Saved-roles signal (Amazon internal, June 2026): Sam's own shortlist shows his top Amazon targets are L6 WWSO GenAI / Data & AI GTM Specialist and Worldwide/Partner Specialist roles (e.g. GenAI-Bedrock, Agentic AI - Kiro & Frontier Agents, Foundation Models, Accelerate Compute), plus Partner Development Manager, GenAI Strategist (Startups), and Deal Intelligence/Automation PMT. Score these L6 GTM / Partner-Specialist / Strategist GenAI roles as STRONG role-type fit (they are his GTM Systems & Agents / Applied AI / AI Product Growth targets with a GTM flavor) rather than capping them at the 'GTM execution = Strong' band - they should reach Perfect when domain and seniority also fit. Internal transfer at L6 is a lateral move (no up-level friction). Do NOT blanket-inflate unrelated Amazon roles (engineering/SA, non-AI infrastructure, pure planning/quota ops).
Google: Target-role signal (Google, June 2026): Sam targets GTM Strategy & Operations, Product Strategy & Growth, Applied AI / AI-native product PM, and Chief-of-Staff-with-build-scope roles at Google (e.g. 'Strategy and Operations Lead/Principal, GTM', 'Product Strategy and Operations Principal, Cloud AI', 'Global Product Lead, GTM Intelligence/Optimization', 'PM, Applied AI' / 'AI-Native Product Development'). Score these GTM-Strategy / Applied-AI / Product-Growth roles as STRONG role-type fit - they are his GTM Systems & Agents / AI Product Strategy & Growth / Applied AI targets, not generic big-co coordination. When domain (AI / GTM / customer-and-product signal) and seniority (Lead / Principal / Head) also fit, let them reach Strong or Perfect rather than pinning them at the big-company 84 cap or a 'GTM execution = Good' band. Do NOT blanket-inflate unrelated Google roles (ads/sales quota ops, recruiting, finance, non-AI infrastructure, engineering / solutions-architect, pure program coordination).
